description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are primarily finished in red brick, with some sections featuring lighter-colored siding or stone accents. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a small covered porch, supported by columns, and a set of steps leading up to the main door. Multiple windows of varying sizes are arranged across the front and sides, some grouped in pairs or threes, providing ample natural light. A garage is attached to one side of the house, with a visible driveway area. The house sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, typical of residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story suburban house with a multi-gabled dark roof, red brick exterior, attached garage, and a covered front porch with columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, and most of the windows and garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the garage extension, and the roof's complexity.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the overall footprint of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance and side windows, with less detail of the main entry.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps leading to a single main door, and minimal decorative elements.
